commands.review_summary:
The branch widens the diagnostics OTel smoke to require trace, metric, and log export, adds Prometheus and combined observability QA script aliases, wires an observability QA-Lab pack, and updates related docs/changelog.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR expands maintainer QA automation rather than reporting a runtime bug. The review used source inspection, current-main diagnostics contracts, and PR proof notes.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is maintainer-owned validation of `pnpm qa:observability:smoke`; there is no narrow code repair for automation to make from this review.

target.title: test(diagnostics): widen observability smokes
target.body:
## Summary
- widens the source-checkout OTel smoke so the local OTLP receiver requires traces, metrics, and logs instead of traces only
- scans raw OTLP payloads for prompt, response, and session sentinels so privacy failures fail the smoke
- adds `qa:prometheus:smoke`, `qa:observability:smoke`, and a QA Lab `observability` pack around the existing protected Prometheus scrape scenario
- updates docs and changelog; fixes the OTEL scenario prompt quoting so QA scenario YAML parses

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 AUTOREVIEW_OPENCLAW_MAINTAINER_VALIDATION=1 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
- remote proof attempted but blocked before test execution: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm qa:observability:smoke"` failed because Blacksmith is not authenticated
- direct AWS Crabbox fallback attempted but blocked before test execution: `../crabbox/bin/crabbox run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm qa:observability:smoke"` failed because AWS credentials/IMDS role are unavailable

Behavior addressed: the existing OTel smoke could pass while metrics or logs export was broken, and Prometheus had no first-class observability smoke alias/pack wiring.
Real environment tested: not completed; both permitted remote runners are blocked before command execution in this environment.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; autoreview command listed above; remote Crabbox/Testbox commands listed above.
Evidence after fix: `scripts/qa-otel-smoke.ts` now asserts trace, metric, and log requests; QA scenario/docs/package wiring are updated; autoreview is clean after the YAML prompt quoting fix.
Observed result after fix: static diff check and autoreview pass; remote runtime proof is blocked by runner auth/credentials.
What was not tested: `pnpm qa:observability:smoke` and `pnpm check:changed` were not run because local testing is disallowed for this task and remote runners are unavailable.
target.author: vincentkoc
